title: PublicKey

algorithm.description: The algorithm associated with the public key that is returned, such as Elliptic Curve Digital Signature Algorithm (ECDSA).

digest.description: The digest associated with the public key that is returned, such as Secure Hash Algorithm 1 (SHA1).

key.description:
The public key that is returned for the specified key ID.

This value is used to validate the eBay push notification message payload.

description: A type that defines the public key for a unique key ID.
